_comments.deepLinking: Story 1.5d — `expo.scheme: aisecretary` registers `aisecretary:///accept-invite?token=…` for tenant-invite acceptance from emailed links. The same URL also serves the web flow at https://app.aisecretary.app/accept-invite?token=… (web is the default in dispatched emails). To enable iOS Universal Links / Android App Links so the email URL opens the app directly when installed, a follow-up infra story will add `expo.ios.associatedDomains: ['applinks:app.aisecretary.app']` and `expo.android.intentFilters` matching the same domain. The custom-scheme fallback works without any DNS / apple-app-site-association setup.
_comments.deepLinkRoutes: Expo Router auto-routes `aisecretary:///accept-invite?token=X` to `app/accept-invite.tsx` (the file route for the path segment after the scheme). No additional `linking` config object is needed — Expo Router introspects the `app/` tree.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AI Secretary records meetings only after explicit consent.
